name: Quotation
purpose: convert customer demand into priced, approved commercial intent
gates: pricing authority, customer terms, approval workflow, SO conversion evidence

name: Customer Purchase Order
purpose: capture external customer commitment and reconcile to quotation/sales order
gates: PO validation, customer reference uniqueness, exception workflow

name: Sales Order
purpose: authorized demand root driving planning, fulfillment and revenue evidence
gates: order line authority, promise date, allocation, change history

name: Purchase Order
purpose: supplier demand commitment, receiving and supplier quality linkage
gates: supplier authorization, item revision, receipt, change and close control

name: Item Revision
purpose: authoritative revision/effectivity model for production and quality records
gates: ECO linkage, effectivity, BOM/routing compatibility, release status

name: Engineering Change Order
purpose: controlled change authority over item, BOM, routing, drawing and quality plans
gates: impact analysis, approval, effective date, implementation verification

name: Job Order
purpose: production intent and WIP authorization for making product
gates: SO/MRP linkage, item revision, routing, material availability, release approval

name: Work Order
purpose: operation-level work authorization and evidence capture
gates: operator/equipment eligibility, instruction version, completion evidence

name: Dispatch Target / Dispatch Board
purpose: supervisor projection for prioritized work; no hidden mutation authority
gates: re-anchor links, no direct mutation, E2E, route WS attributes

name: Purchase Receipt
purpose: receipt of supplier material with inspection and lot creation impact
gates: PO match, supplier lot, incoming inspection trigger, inventory transaction

name: Lot
purpose: material/product lot genealogy, status and containment authority
gates: lot status, genealogy edge, hold/release, split/merge audit

name: Inspection
purpose: inspection plan execution and measured quality evidence
gates: sampling plan, measurement units, disposition, NC trigger

name: Nonconformance Case
purpose: contain, investigate, disposition and link quality escapes
gates: read-only API stabilization, disposition command, CAPA link, e-sign boundary

name: Corrective / Preventive Action
purpose: root-cause, action, verification and effectiveness control
gates: cause taxonomy, action owner, verification evidence, effectiveness timer

name: Batch Release / Product Release
purpose: release decision packet derived from genealogy, inspection, deviation and signoff evidence
gates: release checklist, review by exception, e-sign, hold clearance

name: Controlled Document
purpose: controlled SOP/work instruction/document lifecycle
gates: version/effective date, training impact, approval, archive, read acknowledgement

name: Training Record / Qualification
purpose: prove operator qualification and skill eligibility for work
gates: training matrix, course/evidence, exam, expiration, dispatch eligibility

name: Maintenance Work Order
purpose: maintenance execution and asset readiness authority
gates: asset, PM plan, downtime impact, completion evidence, return-to-service

name: Item Master
purpose: core material/product identity across ERP/MES/eQMS
gates: unique identity, revision policy, UOM, classification, lifecycle

name: Customer Master
purpose: customer identity, terms, site and compliance attributes
gates: duplicate prevention, address/terms authority, sales linkage

name: Supplier Master
purpose: supplier identity, qualification and risk status
gates: qualification, approved item/scope, risk, SCAR history

name: Equipment / Asset
purpose: machine/tool/asset identity for work eligibility and maintenance
gates: status, calibration, PM, zone/conduit, eligibility

name: Measurement Device
purpose: measurement device authority for inspection evidence
gates: calibration status, MSA, permitted measure types, traceability

name: Tenant / Site
purpose: multi-site configuration and data boundary
gates: tenant isolation, site hierarchy, feature flags, data partition

name: User Identity
purpose: human and service identity authority
gates: authn, MFA policy, lifecycle, session

name: Role / Permission
purpose: role and action authorization authority
gates: least privilege, segregation-of-duties, object authorization

name: Policy Decision
purpose: policy-as-code for route/API/command/evidence decisions
gates: deny-by-default, explainability, audit

name: Workflow Definition
purpose: state machine definition for governed roots
gates: states, transitions, guards, owners, version

name: Workflow Event
purpose: immutable workflow transition evidence
gates: actor, from/to state, guard evidence, correlation id

name: Evidence Object
purpose: attached proof, observation, file, measurement or execution evidence
gates: hash, source, retention, chain of custody

name: Electronic Signature
purpose: signature meaning and identity-bound approval evidence
gates: meaning, signer, challenge, record snapshot, audit

name: Audit Trail Event
purpose: immutable trace of authoritative changes
gates: before/after, actor, timestamp, reason, correlation

name: Domain Event
purpose: publishable fact derived from authority roots
gates: schema, version, idempotency, replay

name: Notification
purpose: human/system notification tied to domain event
gates: recipient policy, template, escalation, audit

name: API Contract
purpose: OpenAPI, schemas and compatibility authority
gates: contract diff, examples, problem details

name: Data Contract
purpose: CDC/schema/data product contract
gates: schema version, lineage, DQ checks, owner

name: Operational Truth Graph Node
purpose: semantic object in operational truth graph
gates: node type, source authority, identity, validity

name: Operational Truth Graph Edge
purpose: typed relationship/action/evidence link between roots
gates: edge type, causality, timestamp, actor/source

name: Work Center
purpose: capacity and equipment grouping for scheduling/execution
gates: calendar, eligible equipment, labor skill, constraints

name: Routing
purpose: sequence of operations and standard times
gates: revision/effectivity, work center, instruction linkage

name: Operation Execution
purpose: step-level execution evidence and status
gates: start/stop, operator, equipment, parameter capture, exceptions

name: Tooling
purpose: tool status, calibration, usage and eligibility
gates: tool status, PM/calibration, assignment, lifecycle

name: Machine Program
purpose: controlled machine program/version reference
gates: revision, checksum, machine eligibility, release approval

name: Downtime Event
purpose: loss event for OEE, maintenance and continuous improvement
gates: reason taxonomy, machine, start/end, approval

name: OEE Event
purpose: availability, performance and quality event stream
gates: calculation contract, source mapping, traceability

name: SPC Study / Control Chart
purpose: statistical process control over measured characteristics
gates: rational subgroup, control limits, reaction plan, alarm event

name: Calibration Event
purpose: calibration history and device eligibility
gates: standard traceability, interval, result, due status

name: Measurement System Analysis
purpose: prove measurement system fitness
gates: gage R&R, bias/linearity/stability, acceptance

name: FMEA
purpose: risk analysis linked to control plan and process change
gates: severity/occurrence/detection, action linkage, review

name: Control Plan
purpose: inspection/control requirements derived from risk and design
gates: characteristics, frequency, method, reaction plan

name: Supplier Corrective Action
purpose: supplier quality escape correction and effectiveness
gates: supplier scope, containment, corrective action, verification

name: Material Review Board
purpose: cross-functional disposition of nonconforming material
gates: quarantine, disposition, approvers, inventory transaction

name: Audit Plan
purpose: internal/supplier/customer audit schedule and scope
gates: risk-based schedule, checklist, finding linkage

name: Audit Finding
purpose: audit observation, severity and corrective path
gates: classification, due date, CAPA/SCAR linkage

name: Operational Risk
purpose: formal risk object across product/process/system/AI/security
gates: risk owner, score, control, residual risk, review

name: Customer Complaint
purpose: post-market or customer quality issue root
gates: intake, investigation, regulatory assessment, CAPA link

name: Inventory Transaction
purpose: stock movement ledger and quantity/status authority
gates: lot/status, source doc, posting rules, reconciliation

name: Shipment
purpose: shipping execution and customer delivery evidence
gates: release status, pick/pack, carrier, export/serialization

name: Invoice
purpose: commercial billing evidence linked to shipment/order
gates: SO/ship match, tax, approval, GL posting

name: Cost / Variance
purpose: standard/actual/WIP cost and variance analysis
gates: cost rollup, transaction inputs, approval, finance reconciliation

name: Master Record / Master Batch Record
purpose: regulated master production/batch record template
gates: recipe, instructions, checks, approvals, effective date

name: Completed Record / eBR-eDHR
purpose: executed manufacturing record for release review
gates: step evidence, exception review, signature, release packet

name: Electronic Batch Record
purpose: batch execution record governed by GMP controls
gates: recipe execution, deviations, calculations, review-by-exception

name: Electronic Device History Record
purpose: device history evidence from build to release
gates: serial/lot genealogy, inspections, signatures, DMR linkage

name: Serial Number
purpose: unit-level identity and genealogy
gates: serialization policy, unique identity, configuration, service history

name: APQP Program
purpose: advanced product quality planning program evidence
gates: phased gates, FMEA/control plan/PPAP linkage

name: PPAP Package
purpose: production part approval package
gates: submission level, dimensional, material, capability evidence

name: First Article Inspection
purpose: first article verification package
gates: ballooned drawing, characteristic results, approvals

name: Concession / Deviation Permit
purpose: authorized use-as-is/deviation from requirement
gates: customer/regulatory approval, expiration, affected lots

name: Export Control Record
purpose: export-controlled item/user/shipment compliance evidence
gates: jurisdiction/classification, denied party, license, audit
